'''Amira Nasra''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who owned and operated the [[Illuminated Aquean]] [[Casino/Legends|casino]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vaynai/Legends|Vaynai]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="The Vaynai Archipelago" />
